author: jeffoodchain
content:
Hi everyone, I am Jeff. thank you Mario and Josh for organizing. here are my update for week 0:

I am interested in p2p network and the consensus layer mainly. I am currently working on the backfill sync (block only) in lodestar. Hopefully I will be able to write down some blob updates and catch what Gloas do for the blob and data column updates. Currently the progress is in https://github.com/ChainSafe/lodestar/pull/9238

For the EPF project, I am interested in several topic: 
* [State data analysis](https://github.com/stateless-consensus/wishlist/blob/main/ideas/state-data-analysis.md)
* Grandine: lean client

author: krisoshea.eth
content:
Really nice write up <@1335660981019480075>, I like how you’ve laid it all out, helped my understanding of the problem too! I’ll have my write up published over the weekend so hopefully there will be some stuff / resources in it that you find useful or interesting too, it’s a big topic to research so
I’m hoping we will all uncover / find all the relevant areas to research by cross referencing each others work / write ups. One thing I’ve found with this project is it touches so many EIPs, PRs that are in draft etc, and other client architectures so there’s plenty to research and plenty of things to read up on. It’s a fun one to dive into though, great way to brute force execution client learning / study
